changes: Replace runtime catalog loading with a compile-time generated C# catalog so the plugin no longer references prohibited System.IO APIs inside VaM.
Keep the public title on Joystick Scroller and advance the dev package identity to FrameAngel.JoystickScrollerDev.2.var so VaM sees a fresh test package.
Preserve the package-first dev testing lane while removing the runtime namespace restriction that blocked the packaged plugin from compiling.
